common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Replace boolean 'internal' field with 'KeyAccessModifier' enum to support more granular access control.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: boolean internal = false; -> KeyAccessModifier access = KeyAccessModifier.PUBLIC;

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Update constructor parameter to match the new KeyAccessModifier field type.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: public ReferenceSpecification(String name, String cls, boolean internal) -> public ReferenceSpecification(String name, String cls, KeyAccessModifier access)

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Remove hardcoded default value from ProtoField annotation as the field type changed to an enum.
Implement Base64 URL encoding and decoding methods to serialize the DataAccessContext into a compact string format for transmission.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: Added ENCODER/DECODER constants and encode/forceEncode/genB64 methods using StringBuilder and Base64.

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Provide static factory methods to construct DataAccessContext instances from OObject instances with varying levels of detail.
Add a static parse method to reconstruct a DataAccessContext from its Base64-encoded string representation.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: Added parse(String b64) method that decodes and splits the string to populate fields.

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Replace the Lombok-annotated class with a Java record to leverage modern language features for immutable data carriers.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: public record DataAccessRequest(String oid, String vid, OClass cls, String key, DataAccessContext dac)

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Remove Lombok annotations and imports as the record syntax provides built-in getters, equals, hashCode, and toString.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: Removed import lombok.Data; import lombok.experimental.Accessors; and annotations @Data @Accessors(chain = true)

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Import the new KeySpecification class to support the updated keys field type.
Add a new 'vid' field to the request model.
Add explicit constructors to initialize the new fields and maintain backward compatibility.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: public DataAllocateRequest(String oid, List<KeySpecification> keys, boolean publicUrl) { ... }

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Refactor the exception hierarchy by changing the parent class from NoStackException to OaasValidationException.
Remove the hardcoded HTTP 400 status code from the constructor calls, likely delegating status handling to the new parent exception or framework.
Add a static factory method to create an exception for missing functions using String.formatted.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: public static FunctionValidationException noFunction(String cls, String funcName)

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Add a static factory method to create an exception for access errors using String.formatted.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: public static FunctionValidationException accessError(String objId, String funcName)

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Add a static factory method to create an exception for macro resolution failures using String.formatted.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: public static FunctionValidationException cannotResolveMacro(String ref, String reason)

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Add a generic static factory method to create an exception from a formatted template string.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: public static FunctionValidationException format(String template, Object... params)

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Add a new constructor that accepts a Throwable cause, delegating to the parent class with specific parameters.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: public OaasValidationException(String message, Throwable throwable) { super(message, throwable, false, 400); }

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Introduce a static factory method to create a specific validation error for cyclic inheritance using String.formatted.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: public static OaasValidationException errorClassCyclicInheritance(Collection<String> path) { return new OaasValidationException("Cyclic inheritance detection on %s".formatted(path)); }

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Add documentation comments to enum constants to clarify their access control semantics.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: Added Javadoc blocks describing PUBLIC, INTERNAL, and PRIVATE modifiers.

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Update the base class of OalParsingException from NoStackException to StdOaasException to align with a refactored exception hierarchy.
Add import for InvocationRef to include the invocation model package in the schema builder.
Add static import for PACKAGE_NAME to use the constant in the annotation.
Refactor AutoProtoSchemaBuilder annotation to use a constant for package name and add explicit file path configuration.
Add the invocation model package to the list of base packages scanned by the schema builder.
Define a constant for the protobuf package name to centralize configuration.
Add a static helper method to construct the full protobuf message name from a class.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: static String makeFullName(Class<?> cls) { return PACKAGE_NAME + '.' + cls.getSimpleName(); }

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Add targetConcurrency field to support explicit concurrency targeting in Knative scaling.
Add scaleDownDelay field to configure the delay before scaling down Knative services.
Add apiPath field to specify the API path for the provisioned service.
Remove the non-annotated public constructor that is redundant with the ProtoFactory.
Remove unused imports for Serializable, HashMap, and Map.
Add import for the new DSMap type used in the env field.
Clean up imports that are no longer used after removing the Type enum and JobProvisionConfig.
common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.human_impl: Removed imports for OaasValidationException, ProtoEnumValue, and Serializable.

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Add ProtoField annotation to the 'name' field to enable Protobuf serialization.
Add ProtoField annotation to the 'provider' field to enable Protobuf serialization.
Introduce a new 'access' field with a default value and Protobuf annotation.
Remove the ProtoFactory annotation from the two-argument constructor and simplify it to only set the name.
Add a new two-argument constructor to allow setting name and provider explicitly.
Add a new three-argument constructor annotated with ProtoFactory to support full Protobuf deserialization including the new access field.
Remove ProtoField annotations from getter methods as they are now applied to fields.
